title: Plant species
description: Defines a plant species: how it grows (L-system), what it needs from water + substrate, how it reproduces, how it dies. Each species file is loaded once at startup and instantiated many times during play.

id.description: Stable identifier used by save files and scripts. Never rename - alias instead.

form.description: Top-level growth habit. Drives rough silhouette + collision rules.

leaf_shape.description: Visual leaf geometry. Paddle = wide pointed oval (Crypts), ribbon = long narrow strip (Vallisneria), lance = medium pointed (Ludwigia), needle = thin grass-like (Eleocharis), oval = short waxy (Anubias), round = circular pad (Nymphaea), lobed = irregular (Java Fern).

leaf_width_voxels.description: How many voxels wide each leaf structure is at its widest point.

leaf_length_voxels.description: How many voxels long each leaf structure is.

lsystem.description: Lindenmayer-system specification. Symbols are interpreted by the plant renderer: F=forward, +=branch left, -=branch right, [/]=push/pop, L=leaf, R=root segment, lowercase = species-specific symbols.

rules.description: Map of symbol -> replacement string. May include stochastic alternatives via 'sym?prob1:str1|prob2:str2'.

needs.description: Per-tick demand per L-system segment for chemistry species. Plants pull these from water (or substrate if rooted). Starvation produces visible symptoms (yellowing, melting, pinholes).

light_max.description: Above this, photoinhibition (or just bleaching - reds intensify).

co2_min.description: mg/L threshold below which growth slows sharply.

nutrients.description: Per-tick uptake rate; missing keys default to zero.

prefers_substrate.description: If true, pulls nutrients from substrate before water column.

trigger.description: What event spawns offspring. 'emerged' = only when above water surface.

runner_visible.description: If true, render a visible stolon connecting parent to daughter.

budding_position.description: Where on the parent the daughter plant buds from.

decay_rate_per_day.description: Once dying, segments dissolve into detritus at this rate.

melt_on_water_change_pct.description: Crypt-melt mechanic. Sudden water change beyond this % triggers a melt event - all leaves dissolve but rhizome survives.

leaf_lifespan_days.description: Individual leaves age and shed after this many sim-days. Older leaves darken and eventually detach, producing detritus.

regrow_after_melt_days.description: How many sim-days after a crypt melt before the rhizome begins regrowing.

flowering.description: Multi-stage flowering lifecycle. Plants go through bud → opening → mature → seed pod → seed release.

flower_trigger.description: What triggers flowering. 'emerged' = only flowers above the water surface.

bud_duration_s.description: Sim seconds the bud stage lasts.

open_duration_s.description: Sim seconds the opening animation takes.

mature_duration_s.description: Sim seconds the flower stays in full bloom.

seed_mature_s.description: Sim seconds for the seed pod to mature.

petal_colors.description: Hex color strings for petal palette. First entry is petal, second is center/pistil.

roots.description: Root system parameters. Visible root voxels anchor the plant into the substrate.

root_depth_range.description: Min and max depth in voxels for root tendrils.

deficiency_symptoms.description: Visual symptoms when specific nutrients are depleted.

iron.description: Iron deficiency: new leaves grow pale/yellow instead of green.

potassium.description: Potassium deficiency: holes appear in older leaves.

nitrogen.description: Nitrogen deficiency: oldest leaves yellow first.

pearling.description: O2 bubble emission from leaf surfaces when photosynthesis is saturated.

o2_threshold.description: Dissolved O2 level above which pearling begins.

intensity.description: How vigorously the plant pearls. 1.0 = prolific bubbler.

appearance.description: Palette indices (into the active biotope palette) for different segment kinds. Index ranges are 0-47.

new_growth_palette_indices.description: Brighter/lighter ramp for newly grown leaves at the tips.

dither_volume.description: Apply Bayer dither inside leaves for volume?
